fields.label: Self Relief (RM 9,000)
fields.description: Standard personal relief — RM 9,000 per year.

fields.label: Spouse Relief (Max RM 4,000)
fields.description: RM 4,000 for non-working spouse.

fields.label: Child Relief — Normal (RM 2,000 each)
fields.description: RM 2,000 per qualifying child.

fields.label: Child Relief — Disabled (RM 6,000 each)
fields.description: RM 6,000 per disabled child (excluding autism/learning disability — see YA2026 field below).

fields.label: Child Relief — Autism / Learning Disability (Max RM 10,000, YA2026)
fields.description: YA2026 onwards: Relief for child with autism or learning disability. Ceiling raised from RM 6,000 to RM 10,000 per TP1(1/2026). Leave blank for pre-YA2026 records.

fields.label: Life Insurance Premium (Max RM 3,000)
fields.description: Life insurance premiums — maximum RM 3,000. YA2026: combined with Children Life/Medical Insurance and Voluntary EPF, total capped at RM 3,000.

fields.label: Children Life / Medical Insurance (Max RM 3,000, YA2026)
fields.description: YA2026 onwards: Life or medical insurance premiums for children. Shares the combined RM 3,000 insurance pool with Life Insurance Premium per TP1(1/2026). Leave blank for pre-YA2026 records.

fields.label: Medical / Education Insurance (Max RM 3,000)
fields.description: Medical or education insurance — maximum RM 3,000.

fields.label: Education Fees (Self) (Max RM 7,000)
fields.description: Course fees for skills / professional qualifications — maximum RM 7,000.

fields.label: SSPN Net Deposit (Max RM 8,000)
fields.description: Net deposit into SSPN account — maximum RM 8,000.

fields.label: Childcare Fees — Age ≤6 (Max RM 3,000)
fields.description: Fees paid to registered childcare centres for children aged 6 and below — maximum RM 3,000.

fields.label: Childcare Fees — Age 6–12 After-School Care (Max RM 3,000, YA2026)
fields.description: YA2026 onwards: Fees for Ministry of Education-registered after-school care programmes for children aged 6–12. Extended from childcare relief per TP1(1/2026). Maximum RM 3,000. Leave blank for pre-YA2026 records.

fields.label: Lifestyle Expenses (Max RM 2,500)
fields.description: Books, internet, sports equipment, gym — maximum RM 2,500.

fields.label: PRS Contribution (Max RM 3,000)
fields.description: Private Retirement Scheme contribution — maximum RM 3,000.

fields.label: Serious Illness Medical Expenses (Max RM 10,000)
fields.description: Medical expenses for serious illness — maximum RM 10,000.

fields.label: Parents' Medical Expenses (Max RM 8,000)
fields.description: Medical expenses for parents — maximum RM 8,000.

fields.label: Vaccine Relief — NPRA-Approved (YA2026, No Cap)
fields.description: YA2026 onwards: Cost of any vaccine approved by the National Pharmaceutical Regulatory Agency (NPRA). No hardcoded vaccine list — accepts any NPRA-approved vaccine per TP1(1/2026). No upper cap. Leave blank for pre-YA2026 records.

fields.label: SPA Date (Sale & Purchase Agreement)
fields.description: Date of Sale & Purchase Agreement. Must be between 1 Jan 2025 and 31 Dec 2027 to qualify for housing loan interest relief (Budget 2025 sunset clause).

fields.label: Housing Loan Interest — First Home ≤RM500K (Max RM 7,000, YA2025)
fields.description: Interest on housing loan for first home valued RM500,000 or less. Maximum RM 7,000. Only claimable when SPA is dated 1 Jan 2025 to 31 Dec 2027.

fields.label: Housing Loan Interest — First Home RM500K–RM750K (Max RM 5,000, YA2025)
fields.description: Interest on housing loan for first home valued RM500,000–RM750,000. Maximum RM 5,000. Only claimable when SPA is dated 1 Jan 2025 to 31 Dec 2027.

fields.label: Disability Relief (Self) (RM 7,000 for YA2025; RM 6,000 before)
fields.description: Relief for certified disabled person — RM 7,000 (YA2025 onwards, increased from RM 6,000).

fields.label: Disability Relief (Spouse) (RM 6,000 for YA2025; RM 5,000 before)
fields.description: Additional relief for certified disabled spouse — RM 6,000 (YA2025 onwards, increased from RM 5,000).

fields.label: SOCSO Contributions (Employee Share)
fields.description: Employee SOCSO contributions paid during the year.

fields.label: EPF Contributions (Max RM 4,000)
fields.description: Employee EPF contributions — maximum RM 4,000.

fields.label: Domestic Tourism & Cultural Attraction (Max RM 1,000, YA2026–2027)
fields.description: YA2026 and YA2027 only: Expenses for domestic tourism and cultural attraction activities. Maximum RM 1,000. Time-bounded measure — expires 31 December 2027 per LHDN TP1(1/2026). Leave blank for other years.

fields.label: Additional Voluntary EPF Contribution (i-Topup) (Max RM 3,000 combined with life insurance)
fields.description: Voluntary EPF via KWSP i-Topup facility. YA2026+: Combined with Life Insurance + Children Life/Medical Insurance, capped at RM 3,000 (shared sub-cap). Total EPF + life insurance cannot exceed RM 7,000.

fields.label: Zakat (Annual Amount Paid)
fields.description: Zakat paid — ringgit-for-ringgit tax rebate (handled separately in PCB).

fields.label: Total TP1 Reliefs (RM)
fields.description: Auto-calculated sum of all capped relief fields (excluding Zakat which is a tax rebate).
